Meaning.En: To shed tears, typically as an expression of sadness, pain, or strong emotion.
Meaning.Example: She cried when she heard the sad news.

Situation.Vi: Nghe tin buồn và không kìm được nước mắt.
Situation.En: Receiving distressing news and being unable to hold back tears.

Situation.Vi: Trẻ em khóc vì đói hoặc mệt.
Situation.En: A child cries due to hunger or fatigue.

Meaning.En: A sound produced by shedding tears; an instance of crying.
Meaning.Example: Her cry echoed through the empty hallway.

Situation.Vi: Nghe thấy tiếng khóc từ phòng bên cạnh.
Situation.En: Hearing a cry coming from the adjacent room.

Situation.Vi: Cuộc gọi khẩn cấp được kích hoạt sau tiếng khóc báo động.
Situation.En: The emergency call was triggered after the alarm cry.
